payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Hey, no, overlooked my entire life, it's nothing new. My charity is First Book, which brings reading materials to underprivileged children and helps people become more confident readers and youth that don't have access to programs to help promote literary adventure and really delving into the amazing thing that is reading. Thank you guys for helping us support that, it's been really fantastic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 'Sup, Jewel-face?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I am the Vision. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Donate to the Vision.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I have Operation Supply Drop, which is a great charity service that delivers fun where there is none to soldiers that are in combat overseas. It delivers gaming systems, games, brings some much-needed levity to areas of high intensity and overall warrior badassmanship, and I'm very proud of that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What a variety of charities.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's a good stretch of charities.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: My charity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I got one too, guys!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry. I sometimes forget about you, because you're on that side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know, it happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're god!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. Both of you guys spend about ten, 15 minutes or so scanning through the crew, asking a few questions, helping a few folks out while keeping an eye on reactions around the general vicinity. No one sticks out to you as being either hiding their intent, shifty. There are a few folks that are aloof from the whole experience, who seem to be either in a state of shock, or discomfort based on their current surroundings, but nothing in a way that strikes you as nefarious or worrisome.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is she with us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pike is with you. She is currently helping folks inside the temple. But you could go ask her to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Use the skull to wish to know everyone's alignment. Problem solved.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We'll kill everyone. Kill everyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we should just kill one of them to make an example.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is terrible, what is happening?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This isn't the real game, the game hasn't actually started yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So. Glancing about the populace of scattered refugees throughout the general vicinity of Greyskull Keep, I will pick two of you who wish to be the main surveyors of the crew.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is this insight?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would be insight, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm on it with Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so Vex and Keyleth, both you guys roll insight checks, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: See, this is why I shouldn't have this many dice, because I don't know what to choose. Okay. 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Insight?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Yes, and thank you for taking us." Everyone starts cheering.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And then we talk to the Clasp together.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think that's a good plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They will freak out if 20 refugees pour out of the Sun Tree. And they have no context.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do that first.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So wait, are you going to go on your mission while we go talk to the Clasp?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we're going to wait for you. So can we get the refugees together?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so as you go into the temple and get Pike's attention, you begin to round up the refugees, which as a statement, historically, is already unnerving. You begin to push them all together in a group and tell them what?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, we comfort them and tell them  all right, obviously Emon is not a safe place to be right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, that's true, that's true! It's terrible here!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's dangerous, and we want to keep all of you as safe as possible.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The guards greet you and lead you inside. And within a few minutes, Cassandra comes down from the upper floor. "Percival, you've returned."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: "I regret nothing!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I hope Percy comes back soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I've got the gatestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to get everybody organized. Everyone, please follow me. We're heading towards the main castle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're all looking around.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Welcome to Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A gentle snowfall is coming down. The sky itself you can see is covered in light, white clouds. Just enough moisture to carry the little snowfall that's happening. There are folks in the center of the town that are surprised to see this arrival, but recognize you and cheer a little bit. "Hey! Percival." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you for that smattering of applause. Golf claps, please. Golf claps.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The refugees all gather up behind you, and you guys walk towards Castle Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We make our way to the castle.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. You guys all start noticing there are what looks initially like flocks of birds moving through the sky. Some of them are heading down into parts of the town in the distance. As you continue to push forward, one set of four in particular start heading overhead. You look up and you can see a small cluster of about five or six flying creatures. Not dragon-sized, by any means, but either a very, very large bird or something of that degree. You can't make out the details, as right now as the sun's beginning to set, a lot of it's dark against a red-orange sky. You keep yourself at bay, waiting for them to pass.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Cast Pass Without a Trace on us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You guys, I'd like you all to make a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on, giant blue nut ball dice. Natural 20!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Aw, it fell out of my hand. I don't think it should count if it fell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope, too bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Aw, that's mean. Oh, I get advantage!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and we get a plus ten, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 38. LAURA 35.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait. With no judgment, is Trinket coming?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket is staying with Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a fine decision.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hell hath frozen over.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Placing Trinket over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! He's crying! I'm crying.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as you guys start dodging between the alleyways, making your way towards the north side of Emon, alongside the ruined interior of the Cloudtop District, you instinctually begin to-- and I'd say-- who else has proficiency in perception?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Right here.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I would like you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear a little screech in the distance. (screech) And coming up on the rooftop, you can see, perched up there, appears to be one wyvern that is looking over down at the currently toppled gnome, and on top of the wyvern, you see something riding it. Something that is holding reins on the edge, something humanoid is glancing over, just a little enough of a shadow, to see.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He sees me? I see him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He looks down at you, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I will cast Hold Person on him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what he is, but I want him to stop.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And Scanlan's the only one-- we all see it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You all barely see it looking over the edge as Scanlan's there, left in the middle of the main walkway. That is going to be a natural 17 on the will save. That'll be an 18. What's your DC?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's 17, but the hand-cone makes it 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ah-ha!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you think I had the wherewithal to use it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With having you fallen on your face, I'd say probably not. Since it wasn't specified, that would be a DC of 17. So the creature seems to rear back for a second, shake its head, and you get a little bit of a look at the features at this point, too. And it is humanoid, but you can see its outer body is not fleshy, or smooth, it is scaled and bumpy. You can see ridges across the back of the head, and in one of the hands, looks like some sort of a spear. Immediately as it rears back, it puts its head up and goes (guttural gibberish).

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The creature?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, riding on the back of the wyvern.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Those are the things that attacked the airship!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Possibly.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Go for it. Still maintaining your bonuses from last game, by the way. You haven't taken a short rest yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I think Grog was before me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right, Grog, you're holding your action first.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Right. Can I barrel down through the alley now that someone's on the ground, and race towards the one that's nearest Percy?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say sure. Usually, going forward, if you hold your action, that's just your action, not your movement, you still move to the situation, but I'll let it stand for this, it's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll remember that going forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. So you're going to tear down to this guy there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I would like-- and I would like to swing twice with Craven.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The rider's screeching down while it's holding on, and all of a sudden it shakes its head for a minute and looks down at you, eyes connected, and you know that this entity is waiting for its command.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Two riders?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Come on, Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I guess I'll Dominate one of them. The main guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can you Dominate the beast?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's not a person.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's Dominate Person and Dominate Monster. They're two different things.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to dominate the guy in front.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maverick, not Hollywood.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's Maverick and Goose!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, at the end, it was Hollywood.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, it was Merlin.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Merlin?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Tim Robbins.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Merlin was the teacher, the guy who spun out. Hollywood was the guy who was his--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You don't want to do this with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is the first conversation I've ever been in in this group where I feel young.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, you guys pretty quickly manage to move what you can out of the way, we'll say over the next few minutes the fog is there. Under that cover, you begin to drag the wyvern bodies into the alleyway, into the shadows. If you want to go ahead and make some checks here to go ahead and see if you can harvest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not crisped, just scorched.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: There's some ash. I go ahead and I do a cantrip, Gust, and start spreading out the ash.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. It still looks like someone emptied a bunch of fireplace ash pits into the center of the walkway where there once were lizardfolk.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll have the bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What for?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just the Dust of Tracelessness.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I give us cover. I'll blow my Horn of Fog.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I start putting the Dust of Tracelessness down on the ground so it looks like nobody's been here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Low fog sound as Scanlan blows the horn. Fog fills the vicinity and you guys begin tossing Dust of Tracelessness around--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I go grab the humanoid figures and I throw two over my shoulders and then I get one in each hand and I start dragging them toward a door?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Any-- inside. Just inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: To an "any inside."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll get the door for you. (door creaks)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I would say, given the circumstance, all it would do would offer her advantage, which she already has, so it wouldn't make much difference. So the first one, it's been a little too damaged in battle and you aren't able to really draw any poison from the stinger for the first one-- what's the second one?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I go grab the humanoid figures and I throw two over my shoulders and then I get one in each hand and I start dragging them toward a door?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Any-- inside. Just inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: To an "any inside."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll get the door for you. (door creaks)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you guys pretty quickly manage to move what you can out of the way, we'll say over the next few minutes the fog is there. Under that cover, you begin to drag the wyvern bodies into the alleyway, into the shadows. If you want to go ahead and make some checks here to go ahead and see if you can harvest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, okay, let's do different ones. Okay, so first one, I'll definitely take advantage, so, since I have advantage-- not that much better-- 14. The first one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Would it help if I gave her my Keen Dagger for the rest of it?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So as you finish your short rest, you all progressively find your way down the ladder and to the subterranean sewer system. The choice is to travel to the east or western side of the tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So there could be at this moment in time another person that looks just like me parading around the world?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, if I had to wager on it, I'd say that he's in a dungeon in a rubber suit, but I don't know where, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, thank you. For, you know, doing that-- (nervous laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I never told you because it's creepy as fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Was it the Clasp here, was it the Clasp in Westruun?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It was in Westruun.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, these guys probably don't know me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Probably? Probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll put my hood up--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Stay at the back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I would like to find out who the guy was that wanted me, though. That's kind of weird. Thank you. For everything. thank you. You always have my back and I know it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And for that, I won't say very much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You do you, Vex'ahlia.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Everyone can come down.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. A few of them stand up, hands on the side of their hilt, and stop there for a second before one individual steps out of the shadows and puts his hand up, putting it down. You recognize this to be Garthok.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you look and see a series of small bonfires throughout the room that are currently lit and surrounded by figures. You see a ramshackle tent city, and/or a series of small, wooden hovels that have constructed here. You see a number of figures that are huddled around these bonfires: cloaks, hoods up, generally keeping warm in what is a relatively cold, subterranean area. You guys, glancing over here, as you're first looking, and you can see a few of them appear to be laid up and hurt, and there appear to be at least a few individuals that are heavily bandaged or have slings on. As you guys step into the room, not being very stealthy in your arrival--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We could have been, but I use a bit of sign language from the Cant, and let them know that I'm part of the Clasp?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "You act like that hasn't been our treatment for the entirety of this city's existence. You think your council didn't have dealings with the Clasp for many years before this happened?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I propose a counter-offer. I just don't feel comfortable offering Vasselheim; I don't think that we could necessarily deliver, and we, honestly, have a lot to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All I'm asking is an introduction to a handful of key figures in the city, no more than that."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I will not promise that now. What I can promise right now is some access to materials from Whitestone, which-- and I show him my gun hilt, which is embedded with the gems. I can see what's still lying around, and we can make a deal. I can also promise that for the reconstruction, once this has been dealt with, which is in everybody's best interest, until such time as there's a functioning government in this city, you will be treated with the respect appropriate of a group of people who are helping keeping the city functional.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Kind of. A moment passes. Keyleth, you pull your hand back, and where the Clasp symbol once was, there is a hand mark burned into the back of the shoulders.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This mark. Is it magic? Can they trace you through this mark?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't answer. I walk over to Keyleth. Can you still do the thing with your hands?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (fire noise) That thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I rip my shirt down. I want you to burn it away. Now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Vex, do you have an arrow?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I hand it to him. Put this in between your teeth. (sizzling noise)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (sizzling noise) Searing white pain through the back of your eyes, Vax, as Keyleth presses her palm into the center of your shoulder blades. You can hear the sizzling and cracking of skin, and smell the burning of Vax's flesh in the air in this cellar. Make a constitution check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seven. You break through the arrow with your grip, and actually give out a very loud, painful scream out of reaction.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Like you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Similar to when you hit me in my arm.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He is asleep, currently, yeah. "He's been conscious throughout the day while you were gone, but he's got to rest a bit more. He's still had a rough few days."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. Back to the keep then, I guess. When we get there can we check in on Gilmore and the queen?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. And as you return to the keep, Pike has been taking care of the rest of the individuals, and she's been seeing to Gilmore's side. Gilmore is fast asleep, dealing with the tail end of a fever that has broken, after the healing from the day before. Earlier in the day, I should say. It also appears that Salda and the children have been in and out, keeping an eye as well. Pike, as you enter, looks up to you with a smile, and says, "He'll be all right. He's going to pull through."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's wonderful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I should probably stay with him for a bit. Make sure he's okay."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is he unconscious still, or just sleeping?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So you guys find yourselves resting for the evening. You take to a night's sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's wonderful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I should probably stay with him for a bit. Make sure he's okay."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is he unconscious still, or just sleeping?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is asleep, currently, yeah. "He's been conscious throughout the day while you were gone, but he's got to rest a bit more. He's still had a rough few days."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's dead on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just needs headphones.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I just need headphones, and to brush against the mic occasionally. Especially during really really impactful story moments.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: "What? What?"

payload.raw_text: If you don't sleep you're going to start getting levels of exhaustion for the next day.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: So you guys find yourselves resting for the evening. You take to a night's sleep.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: If you don't sleep you're going to start getting levels of exhaustion for the next day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's wonderful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I should probably stay with him for a bit. Make sure he's okay."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is he unconscious still, or just sleeping?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is asleep, currently, yeah. "He's been conscious throughout the day while you were gone, but he's got to rest a bit more. He's still had a rough few days."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's dead on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.text: I just need headphones, and to brush against the mic occasionally. Especially during really really impactful story moments.

preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you got to sleep.

payload.raw_text: Jump forward to the next morning--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So you lose the strength bonus. Everyone, you can get half of your hit dice back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's a lot of--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: As the sun goes down? It's been down and everyone's going to their rooms? I go to Keyleth's door and knock on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I open the door. Hi.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hi. I don't want to be alone tonight. Do you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I haven't been wanting to be alone most nights. And I let him in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So, we--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Bow-chicka-wow-wow!

payload.raw_text: So, next morning, you all wake up; full hit points, get back half of your max hit dice that you spent. All your spells back.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Jump forward to the next morning--

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: That wasn't the kind of ship I was hoping to get. (laughter)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: I don't think we can all fit on that ship.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Very well." It takes a few minutes for that to be retrieved from down south of the tomb in the mausoleum, but nevertheless, you get four half-dollar-sized pieces of residuum glass.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I'm not going to say no to the gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Obviously, we'll sieve the coffer a little bit because we're going to need it for the mission.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So very generous of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Also, let's re-employ our castle guards as the Emon royal guards in the meantime, and they can serve the queen and her children.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That can be very easily presented. Oh, here we are!" There's a small chest with a lid that she hands it over to you. Actually, puts it out and your hands are already out. "All right. 2,000 gold from our coffers. It's not much, but we have to keep the city running."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And a small amount of the green gem, if that would be possible, that's left over from the mining operation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of the glass?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Of the glass. If possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, certainly."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. I'm working on something.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I'm thankful that we even have an opportunity to offer aid to somebody. That's thanks to you, so it's nothing on us."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And a small amount of the green gem, if that would be possible, that's left over from the mining operation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Of the glass. If possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, certainly."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. I'm working on something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well." It takes a few minutes for that to be retrieved from down south of the tomb in the mausoleum, but nevertheless, you get four half-dollar-sized pieces of residuum glass.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Perfect.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Four shards of residuum glass. "I hope that's of aid to you. Apology for the confusion. We have quite a bit of individuals to find homes for, and get them running."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Gilmore will be of great help.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, as you've told me."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) I'm sorry to drop this all on you, and I'm thankful.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. You find an evening's rest. The next morning comes uneventfully. You find yourselves refreshed. I'd say at this point, you're all at full hit dice after two nights of rest; you're fine. So, on to Whitestone, Keyleth?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's better. 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 22. You've affixed it to your boot. We'll see if it works.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And I've got one working piece? I know each individual build, I have to build the--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The nubbin.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The actual device itself has to be built for individual usage; it's not auto. I'm going to try and build one and see how it goes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So total cost for the materials on that will put you at about 300 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 300 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm working on something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, it's your city.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you borrowing 300 of your gold from the money you loaned to Vex?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Since the day I've met her, I've given her every bloody dime I've made. So, yes. I no longer even think about it anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I love you for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's practically the royal treasurer. She's just happier that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) "She's just happier that way."

payload.trigger_phrase: You make your way to the outside
payload.raw_text: Okay. You make your way to the outside of the main Slayer's Take guildhall. The dark wood exterior greets you happily. You can see they still have a gathering of various antlers of creatures that are tangled into each other that form this rustic-looking entrance. And there on the front doors, you see emblazoned the Slayer's Take-- for lack of a better term, their symbol with the words of their actual guild spread across it, as you saw before. Opening the front door, you can see within the main foyer area, there is the dark iron chandeliers that run across the entire length of the moot hall, if you will. Across the front area, you find the clerk desk. Sitting behind it, a familiar red-haired, tousled, chin-bearded, scarred-up tiny man with his feet up on the desk, falling asleep in his chair.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: What's left of it. That will be a trip that will be necessary soon, but not yet.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You guys hit the Slayer's Take first, or where are you heading?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Just to let them know we're here and we need some rooms.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "What is this craziness? (laughs) Ah! It's been some time."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Oi!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ta-da!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Vanessa, she's currently out on a hunt. Should be back in the next day or so."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Oi!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ta-da!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What is this craziness? (laughs) Ah! It's been some time."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It has.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "So. Hello."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hi.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What's your business? What are you looking for?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Dragons? Have you heard about anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Other than the fact that you killed one. That is the most recent, but nothing beyond that, really, no."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to need rooms.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And we're probably going to need to speak to your lady lord.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Your wife.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, your wife, but I'm talking about the boss, here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's his wife.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Higher still  the sphinx.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It would be 10 00, 10 30 in Whitestone. About 6:30, 7:00 in the morning in Vasselheim.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll get up in the morning, we'll take some of that gold, we'll put it to good use, we'll wait until Nessa gets back, and then we'll carve out a plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Percival?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That sounds just fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Kord's strength to us all.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wonder if Kashaw is still here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Probably, he works here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Who?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Kashaw. That was the one that they went on a--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Right, Keyleth? The guy that kissed you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (stammers)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Brooding. Handsome. He was so troubled.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He was.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He was very handsome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So we should probably go to sleep, you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's morning, still.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's maybe 10 00am.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Take a nap?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's across the world, so it's technically earlier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You know, it's jet lag. It's teleport lag. It gets to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe Nessa and Zahra have seen him. We could find out. We could use another healer, always.
